zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwladys Ferch Ieuan於1520年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾時，她的父親Ieuan "Bach" ap Dafydd55歲，母親Catrin ferch Dafydd "Anwyl"20歲。她於大約1535年與Hugh Lewis在威爾士格拉莫爾根利亞尼申結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1576年在威爾士享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwladys Ferch Ieuan于1520年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾时，她的父亲Ieuan "Bach" ap Dafydd55岁，母亲Catrin ferch Dafydd "Anwyl"20岁。她于大约1535年与Hugh Lewis在威尔士格拉莫爾根利亞尼申结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1576年在威尔士享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Gwladys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old form of   Gladys  , of uncertain derivation.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwladys Ferch Ieuan was born in 1520, in Breconshire, Wales, her father, Ieuan "Bach" ap Dafydd, was 55 and her mother, Catrin ferch Dafydd "Anwyl", was 20. She married Hugh Lewis about 1535, in Llanishen, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1576, in Wales, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwladys Ferch Ieuan est née en 1520, à Breconshire, Galles, son père, Ieuan "Bach" ap Dafydd, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Catrin ferch Dafydd "Anwyl", avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Lewis environ 1535, à Llanishen, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1576, à Galles, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwladys Ferch Ieuan 1520 in Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ieuan "Bach" ap Dafydd 55 und ihre Mutter Catrin ferch Dafydd "Anwyl" 20. Sie hat um 1535 in Llanishen, Glamorgan, Wales Hugh Lewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1576 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys Ferch Ieuan è nata il nel 1520 nel Breconshire, Galles, sua padre, Ieuan "Bach" ap Dafydd, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Catrin ferch Dafydd "Anwyl", aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Lewis circa 1535, nel Llanishen, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1576, nel Galles, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwladys Ferch Ieuanが1520年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ieuan "Bach" ap Dafyddは55歳，母Catrin ferch Dafydd "Anwyl"は20歳であった。約1535年にウェールズグラモーガンラニシェンでHugh Lewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1576年にウェールズで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwladys Ferch Ieuan(이)가 1520년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ieuan "Bach" ap Dafydd(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catrin ferch Dafydd "Anwyl"(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1535년 웨일스 글램르건 랜이셰에서 Hugh Lewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1576년 웨일스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys Ferch Ieuan nasceu em 1520, em Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Ieuan "Bach" ap Dafydd, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Catrin ferch Dafydd "Anwyl", tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Lewis aproximadamente 1535, em Llanishen, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1576, em Gales, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwladys Ferch Ieuan родилась в 1520 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Ieuan "Bach" ap Dafydd было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Catrin ferch Dafydd "Anwyl", 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Lewis около 1535 г. в местности лланишен, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1576 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwladys Ferch Ieuan nació en 1520, en Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Ieuan "Bach" ap Dafydd, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Catrin ferch Dafydd "Anwyl", tenía 20 años. Se casó con Hugh Lewis aproximadamente 1535, en Llanishen, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1576, en Gales, a la edad de 56 años.
